title: Marketplace Manager - JioMart - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - JioMart - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the JioMart family as a Marketplace Manager in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About JioMart:
JioMart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JioMart!
